description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers featuring a glossy black exterior with prominent gold accents. The shoes display two gold stripes along the sides and a repeating fleur-de-lis pattern in gold on the heel and ankle areas, giving them a distinctive, stylish look. The toe box and upper front sections have a textured, diamond-patterned surface, while the rest of the shoe is smooth and shiny. The tongue and ankle collar are padded for comfort, and the shoes are equipped with standard black laces. The soles are black and appear to be made of rubber, providing grip and durability. A large gold fleur-de-lis emblem is also present on the outer side of each shoe, reinforcing the decorative theme.
description: Glossy black high-top sneakers with gold stripes and fleur-de-lis patterns, featuring padded collars and textured toe boxes.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing gold stripes, large fleur-de-lis emblem, and textured toe box.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the gold fleur-de-lis pattern on the heel and ankle areas.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the gold stripes and the repeating fleur-de-lis pattern on the heel.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying both shoes' toe boxes, gold stripes, and padded tongues.
attribute_logo: Large gold fleur-de-lis on the outer side of each shoe; repeating small gold fleur-de-lis pattern on heel and ankle.
